categories.title: The 8 Key Sources of Your Stress
categories.subtitle: Find out exactly what's triggering stress in each area of your life.
categories.work_desc: Job pressure, deadlines, workplace conflicts, career transitions
categories.money_desc: Bills, debt, financial insecurity, budget concerns
categories.relationships_desc: Family conflicts, romantic stress, friendship problems
categories.physical_desc: Health concerns, chronic pain, sleep problems, fatigue
categories.studies_desc: Exam stress, academic pressure, learning challenges
categories.life_changes_desc: Moving, divorce, loss, major transitions, uncertainty
categories.lifestyle_desc: Too much to do, no time for self, constant rushing

how_it_works.title: How It Works
how_it_works.subtitle: Everything you need to understand and relieve your stress immediately.
how_it_works.step1_desc: Tell the AI what's weighing on you — work pressure, relationships, health concerns, or anything else. The system asks a few gentle questions to understand your unique situation.
how_it_works.step2_desc: See exactly how stress is affecting 8 key areas of your life: work, relationships, physical health, mental health, finances, and more. Understand where your stress is strongest and where support can help most.
how_it_works.step3_desc: Get a hypnotherapy audio session designed specifically for your stress areas. Calm your mind, release tension, and reconnect with your inner calm — anytime you need it.

benefits.title: Why Choose StressReleasor?
benefits.price_desc: Covers AI processing, audio generation, and server costs. No subscriptions or hidden fees — pay only when you use it.
benefits.instant_desc: No appointments, no waiting. Start getting relief right now.
benefits.report_desc: Discover how your stress affects 8 key life areas: work, relationships, health, finances, and more. Know exactly where to focus.
benefits.private_desc: Your conversations are completely private. No judgment, just support.
benefits.expert_desc: Developed by a certified hypnotherapist from Toronto, Canada with years of experience.
benefits.available_desc: Stress doesn't wait. Neither should relief. Access anytime, anywhere.
benefits.chronic_desc: Whether your stress is short-term or long-standing, you can experience relief within minutes.
benefits.value_desc: For just $2, you get personalized stress relief and a full stress impact report — a service worth $100–$150 if you went to a hypnotherapist, counselor, or therapist.

cta.title: Ready to See How Stress Is Affecting Your Life?
cta.subtitle: Get your personalized Stress Impact Report across 8 life areas + instant relief techniques and custom audio. Just $2, no subscription.
cta.button: Give Me My Stress Impact Report & Personalized Audio

about.title: About StressReleasor
about.intro: We're on a mission to make mental health support accessible to everyone.
about.mission_text: Making effective stress management accessible and affordable to everyone who needs it.

founder.title: Meet the Founder
founder.name: Inam Alvi
founder.credentials: Certified Hypnotherapist, Life Coach & NLP Practitioner
founder.bio: Inam Alvi is a Hypnotherapist, Life Coach, and NLP Practitioner who has guided countless individuals toward a brighter, more balanced life. His background in IT before transitioning to mental health gave him the edge to develop a one-of-its-kind platform, designed to help millions of people facing different mental health challenges. He is committed to making support accessible 24/7 and affordable, helping individuals transform their lives effectively.

community.title: Community Support
community.intro: Our community is built on compassion and mutual support. If you're facing financial hardship and need stress relief, our community is here to help. If you're able to give, your generosity can change someone's life.

how_it_works.title: How Community Support Works
how_it_works.step1_desc: Share your story and the support you need
how_it_works.step2_desc: Sponsors browse appeals and choose who to support
how_it_works.step3_desc: Get the stress relief sessions you need
how_it_works.step4_desc: When you're able, help others in the community
